services.intro: A website is often the starting point — but digital goes much further. Here's what I can build for your business:
services.cat1Body: Fast, modern, designed to turn visitors into customers. No generic templates — every site is built around your business.
services.cat2Body: Got a process to automate? A tool that doesn't exist yet? I build custom web applications and SaaS tailored to your real business needs.
services.cat3Body: Chatbots, automations, content generation, virtual assistants. I bring AI into your business in a practical, useful way — not as a passing trend.
services.cat4Body: Google Ads, Meta, TikTok. I manage campaigns across all platforms, from strategy to creative.
services.cat5Body: Promotional videos, social media content, creative advertising generated with AI tools.
services.closing: If your project doesn't fit neatly into these categories, reach out anyway. Chances are I can help — or I'll tell you honestly if I can't.

about.tagline: Freelance web designer in Sardinia · 10+ years of experience
about.p1: Originally from the Republic of Moldova, I'm now based in Sardinia, Italy, working remotely with clients across Europe and beyond.
about.p2: I've been building websites and applications for over 10 years. In that time I've learned one simple thing: a good digital project doesn't come from a template — it comes from a conversation. That's why you always work directly with me. No middlemen, no account managers. You tell me what you need, I listen, and together we build something that actually works for your business.
about.p3: Whether it's a simple website, a custom application, or an advertising campaign, my approach stays the same: constant communication, full transparency, and no promises I can't keep.
about.expertise1: Websites for restaurants, hotels and local businesses in Sardinia
about.expertise2: Local SEO and Google Business Profile
about.expertise5: Sites for shops, auto detailing and local services
about.closing: If you have a project in mind — even just an idea — get in touch. Let's talk, no commitment.

problems.body: if you don't have a proper website, they're booking with someone else.
problems.bodyStrong: no excuses — you need to be findable
problems.card1Body: customers search on google. if you're not there, you don't exist.
problems.card2Title: customers don't understand what you do
problems.card2Body: outdated site, confusing info, bad photos. a confused customer doesn't book.
problems.card3Body: the customer has to hunt for your number. every friction point is a lost booking.

solutions.title1: a website that works for you.
solutions.item1Body: every site is designed from scratch for your business. no cookie-cutter templates that look like your competitor's.
solutions.item2Body: contact forms, whatsapp, online bookings. your customer doesn't have to search for anything.
solutions.item3Body: 70% of your customers search from their phone. your site will be fast, clean, and easy to use.

faq.q1: How much does a website cost in Sardinia?
faq.a1: Flat rate: $550 for a complete custom website. Includes custom design, mobile version, contact forms and basic SEO. No deposit — you only pay when the site is finished and you're happy with it.
faq.q2: How long until my site is live?
faq.a2: The free mockup arrives within 48 hours of first contact. Once approved, the full site goes live within days. For complex projects (e-commerce, apps) we agree on timelines together.
faq.a3: Includes: custom design, responsive development (mobile-first), contact forms and WhatsApp integration, speed optimization, basic SEO setup, and launch assistance. Hosting and domain are separate (~$55-90/year) — I'll guide you through it.
faq.q4: Why hire a local web designer instead of Wix or a template?
faq.a4: Templates look the same for everyone and are often slow. A web designer in Sardinia builds around your business: restaurant menus, detailing galleries, hotel bookings. Result: more contacts, more bookings, fewer lost customers.
faq.q5: How does the free 48-hour mockup work?
faq.a5: Message me on WhatsApp, tell me about your business in 5 minutes. Within 48 hours you get a real design mockup of your site — not a generic screenshot. You review it, decide, zero pressure.
faq.q6: Do I need to pay upfront?
faq.a6: No, never. No deposits, no hidden subscriptions. You see the mockup first, then the finished site. You pay only if you're satisfied. The most transparent way to work — and the safest for you.
faq.q7: Do you integrate AI into websites?
faq.a7: Yes. I can add AI chatbots, customer response automations, content generation and virtual assistants. AI isn't a trend — it's a practical tool to respond faster and not lose leads.
faq.q8: Is the site optimized for Google and mobile?
faq.a8: Always. Every site is mobile-first (70% of customers search from their phone) and includes basic on-page SEO: titles, meta descriptions, speed, proper structure. For faster results I can also manage Google Ads campaigns.
faq.q9: Can you also manage Google Ads?
faq.a9: Yes. Beyond website creation, I manage Google Ads and Meta campaigns for local businesses. A well-built site + targeted ads = more contacts on a modest budget. Ideal for restaurants, hotels and local services in Sardinia.
faq.a10: Out of respect for client privacy I don't display everything publicly. But on WhatsApp I'll gladly show you concrete examples — sites for restaurants, shops, professionals. Message me and see them in minutes.
faq.q11: Do you only work in Sardinia?
faq.a11: I'm based in Sardinia (Nuoro, Ogliastra, eastern area), but work with clients across Italy and abroad. The advantage for local Sardinian businesses: I understand the context, tourism, seasonality and how customers search on mobile.
faq.q12: Is there a guarantee if I'm not satisfied?
faq.a12: The guarantee is built into the process: free mockup first, payment after. If the mockup doesn't convince you, you don't proceed and pay nothing. If you proceed but something's off, we work until you're satisfied. Zero risk for you.
